title: Lad's Skybox
description: A night sky filled with nebulae and wonder.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TBzA4pmUpHc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This pack adds a custom night sky to the game. The sky is full of stars and has nebulae scattered about. The sky was procedurally generated in Blender.

(REQUIRES [NUIT](https://modrinth.com/project/YBz7DOs8), [OPTIBOXES](https://modrinth.com/project/DWuwk8aA) OR [OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/home))
**This resource pack has been stolen and reuploaded to other websites. Do not download Lad's Skybox from anywhere other than Modrinth or [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/lads-skybox).**

<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>
  
You may:
- Modify this pack for personal use
- Include this project in modpacks uploaded to Modrinth and CurseForge

You may not:
- Reupload or redistribute this pack or any assets from this page in ANY form

</details>


<details>
<summary>About Updates</summary>

I usually only test pack updates on the latest version of Minecraft. Resource packs are almost always backwards and forwards compatible. If you experience any issues or if the pack doesn't work, please report it to me.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

Thank you to the developers of Nuit for helping me get this working with their project. (This project has not been endorsed by them, they were just very helpful in answering my questions)

</details>

If you have a feature request, feel free to create an issue on my issue tracker

Consider leaving a small tip on Venmo? @Lad_Flaver
